name: Bishop Donahue
description: Bishop Donahue is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in McMechen, WV. There are 3 indoor courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Amenities include lights.

name: East End Park
description: East End Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Moundsville, WV. There are 2 outdoor asphalt courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets.
